response.justification: The candidate is a strong, versatile senior engineer, but his profile fundamentally mismatches this role. The job mandates 5-10 years of hands-on C++ on Windows, yet his only professional C++ work was roughly seven months at National Instruments in 2014-2015; his career centers on TypeScript/Node.js, DLang, and web platforms. He shows no SQL Server or Oracle experience (MySQL/MongoDB instead) and no fixed income, capital markets, or investment banking domain exposure — RIDE Capital and Stripe are consumer fintech/payments, not capital markets systems. Neither mandatory pillar of the role is met.
strengths: Extensive senior-level engineering experience across web, backend, mobile, and systems software at reputable companies (Stripe, Shopify)
Proven low-latency, high-throughput systems work (millions of requests/sec) showing strong performance-engineering fundamentals
Excellent communication skills evidenced by conference talks, workshops, and courses he created and delivered
concerns: Only ~7 months of professional C++ experience versus the mandatory 5-10 years on Windows
No fixed income, capital markets, or investment banking domain experience
No SQL Server or Oracle background; database experience is limited to MySQL and MongoDB

key_factors.factor: C++ experience far below mandatory 5-10 years
No capital markets / fixed income domain knowledge
Strong general engineering seniority and communication
